subcodes.title: Words spoken in Aug. 1913 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Sacrifice of life is of two kinds. To be killed for the cause is not so difficult as to live for it in absolute obedience to the commands of God.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
